title: 4 Pcs Butterfly Wooden Inspirational Quotes Wall Art, Unique Motivational Wall Decor Plaque for Bedroom Bathroom Office Positive Affirmations Word Sign
features: 【Butterfly Decor Positive Plaques】You'll receive four elegant butterfly wall art pieces, enough for your everyday decor needs. These purple butterfly wall art inspirational gifts will infuse your space with warmth and relaxation.

【Inspirational Quote Design】The wall art plaques feature inspirational quotes and a purple butterfly. When you're feeling down, look up to these girly wall signs to bring warmth and inspiration, filling your room with a positive vibe.

【High-Quality Material】These purple butterfly wall signs are crafted from wood, meticulously crafted for a long-lasting, beautiful finish. This elegant purple wall decor measures approximately 10 x 4 x 0.2 inches / 25 x 10 x 0.5 cm, suitable for hanging in most places without taking up too much space.

【Wide Range of Uses】This inspirational quotes wall art can be placed anywhere in your home, including the bedroom, bathroom, living room, dining room, study, and office. This warm and positive purple wall sign can also be given as a gift to a friend, daughter, or granddaughter.

【Motivational Gifts for Teenages】Give this positivewall plaque to your girlfriend, daughter, granddaughter, niece, or friend for more meaningful occasions like birthdays, Thanksgiving, and Christmas parties. Each purple signs & plaques features a message of praise, which will not only surprise them but also provide positive energy for their daily lives.
